# googlewallet_issuer (Data Source)

Fetches a single Google Wallet Issuer by ID.

Use this data source to look up an existing issuer by its unique identifier.

## Example Usage

```hcl
data "googlewallet_issuer" "example" {
  id = "1234567890123456789"
}

output "issuer_name" {
  value = data.googlewallet_issuer.example.name
}
```

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read a Google Wallet Issuer by ID
data "googlewallet_issuer" "example" {
  id = "1234567890123456789"
}

output "issuer_name" {
  value = data.googlewallet_issuer.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the issuer. This is a string representation of the int64 issuer ID.

### Read-Only

- `contact_info` (Attributes) Contact information for the issuer. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--contact_info))
- `homepage_url` (String) URL for the issuer's home page.
- `name` (String) The account name of the issuer.

<a id="nestedatt--contact_info"></a>
### Nested Schema for `contact_info`

Read-Only:

- `alerts_emails` (List of String) Email addresses that receive alerts.
- `email` (String) Primary contact email address.
- `name` (String) Primary contact name.
- `phone` (String) Primary contact phone number.
